parameters.text: Please send a photo of the receipt.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ transactions: [{ type: 'withdrawal', date: $('Prepare Upload').item.json.date, amount: String($('Prepare Upload').item.json.amount), description: $('Prepare Upload').item.json.vendor + ' - ' + $('Prepare Upload').item.json.description, source_name: $('Prepare Upload').item.json.sourceAccount, destination_name: $('Prepare Upload').item.json.vendor, category_name: $('Prepare Upload').item.json.category, notes: 'Receipt: ' + $('Prepare Upload').item.json.nextcloudPath }] }) }}

parameters.text:
=Added ${{ $('Prepare Upload').item.json.amount }} at {{ $('Prepare Upload').item.json.vendor }} ({{ $('Prepare Upload').item.json.category }})

Receipt saved: {{ $('Prepare Upload').item.json.nextcloudPath }}
